creator: brandon.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171522
This is the output pkg 1.8.5 provides with the sat error. And the systems pkg info.

So pkg 1.8.5 has this SAT error and then tries to only install emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod. The only other version I have tested that does *not* exhibit this issue is pkg 1.7.7.

I've attached the output, this is on a clean VM for illustrative purposes.
